bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: What some call "unused land" is often the last safe haven for countless living creatures. Wetlands are not empty spaces waiting to be developed. They are nurseries for birds, natural water filters, flood defenses, and wildlife habitats that cannot be replaced once lost.

NEW: @maxblau.bsky.social spent a year reporting on abuses of farmworkers.

It left him wondering: Is there any way to find out whether the produce he buys at the grocery store comes from farms with a record of mistreating workers?

bsky.name: Niko Bowie
bsky.text: This state supreme court opinion pulls no punches: “This court does not anchor Hawaiʻi’s due process rights to the federal floor. Especially one that keeps sinking. . . . State constitutionalism makes it easy to consider Roberts Court jurisprudence ‘white noise.’”

bsky.name: Petra Michaela
bsky.text: When wetlands and landscapes disappear, the insects, animals, and birds do not simply move on. Many vanish quietly, habitat by habitat. Protecting such areas does not mean hindering progress; it means choosing a future where progress embraces nature rather than wiping it out.

bsky.name: For the Love of Missy
bsky.text: You can be tired, but youll never be as tired as an indoor cat who already slept for 18 hours, eaten three meals, six snacks , and is still tired.
